description: Thematic preamble — 3 chained lines from Extraction 2's opening scene. The line STATES the theme (hero fought back from death); the visuals in preamble shots s001-s005 DELIVER the theme (hero-down → hero-down → looking up → rising → ready). Song ducks -10 dB during each cue, returns by first beat at 9.84s.

cues.line: Tyler, you were clinically dead nine months ago.

cues.visual_note: hero looking up / opens eyes / hand reaches
